title: Hello World
author: Invert
excerpt: Welcome to Invert, the database-less, adapter-driven content presentation layer.
body:
Welcome to Invert — a database-less, adapter-driven content presentation layer built on Astro.

There is no admin panel. There is no database. Content comes in as JSON. Where that JSON comes from is not Invert's problem — that's what adapters are for.

Getting Started

Edit src/lib/config.ts to configure your adapters and site settings. Add your content to content/ (JSON) or markdown/ (Markdown) and run npm run dev.
